infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AgriAI uses your location to provide local weather and crop recommendations.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AgriAI uses your camera to capture crop photos for disease detection.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AgriAI needs gallery access to pick crop photos for disease detection.
